ABOUT_ME.TITLE: About Me
ABOUT_ME.DESCRIPTION: Write some information about yourself that is IT related. Why are you passionate about coding? What is your source of inspiration for improving your programming skills?
ABOUT_ME.LOCATION: Where are you located? Are you open to different ways of working, such as working remotely or even relocating?
ABOUT_ME.MINDSET: Show that you are open-minded. Are you enthusiastic about learning new technologies and continually improving your skills?
ABOUT_ME.PROBLEM_SOLVING: A brief description of your problem-solving approach. Do you learn from each challenge as you search for the most efficient or elegant solution? You can include some keywords like: analytical thinking, creativity, persistence and collaboration.

SKILLS.TITLE: My Skills
SKILLS.DESCRIPTION: Show that you have used a variety of front-end technologies in your projects.
SKILLS.ENTHUSIASM: Reveal enthusiasm for learning new technologies and frameworks.

PORTFOLIO.TITLE: Portfolio
PORTFOLIO.DESCRIPTION: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.

CONTACT.TITLE: Contact
CONTACT.HEADING: Got a problem to solve?
CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: Encourage people to contact you and describe what role you are interested in. Show that you will add value to their projects through your work.
CONTACT.CTA: Need a Frontend developer? Contact me!
CONTACT.PRIVACY_AFTER: and agree to the processing of my data as outlined.
